code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import axios from'axios';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const GalleryPage=()=>{const[images,setImages]=useState([]);const[lightboxImage,setLightboxImage]=useState(null);useEffect(()=>{const fetchGallery=async()=>{try{const res=await axios.get('http://localhost:5000/api/gallery');setImages(res.data);}catch(error){console.error('Failed to load gallery:',error);}};fetchGallery();},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"p-8",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:"text-3xl font-bold mb-6 text-center",children:"Proofing Gallery"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6",children:images.map((img,index)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"bg-white shadow hover:shadow-lg transition rounded cursor-pointer",onClick:()=>setLightboxImage(img),children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:`http://localhost:5000${img.imageUrl}`,alt:img.title,className:"w-full h-64 object-cover rounded-t"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"text-center font-medium p-2",children:img.title})]},index))}),lightboxImage&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"fixed inset-0 bg-black bg-opacity-80 flex items-center justify-center z-50",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"relative bg-white p-4 rounded shadow-lg max-w-3xl w-full",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"absolute top-2 right-2 text-gray-700 text-xl",onClick:()=>setLightboxImage(null),children:"\u2716"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:`http://localhost:5000${lightboxImage.imageUrl}`,alt:lightboxImage.title,className:"w-full object-contain max-h-[80vh] rounded"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"text-center font-semibold mt-4",children:lightboxImage.title})]})})]});};export default GalleryPage;
